# CWE-494: remote plugin bytes executed without integrity verification.
lang: go
file: CWE-494-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/exec"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func InstallWorker(c *gin.Context) {
	url := c.Query("bundle_url")
	resp, err := http.Get(url)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadGateway, err.Error())
		return
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	path := "/tmp/worker.bin"
	f, _ := os.Create(path)
	_, _ = io.Copy(f, resp.Body)
	_ = f.Close()
	cmd := exec.Command(path)
	_ = cmd.Run()
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
